title: Legendary Tooltips x Equipment Compare
description: Fix tooltip rendering issues when Legendary Tooltips and Equipment Compare are installed by ensuring that the stack count is always hidden behind the tooltips.
body:
# 🌟 Legendary Tooltips x Equipment Compare 📊 This mod fixes tooltip rendering issues when Legendary Tooltips and Equipment Compare are installed by ensuring that the stack count is always hidden behind the tooltips. ## 🔄 Versions Minecraft >= 1.21.1
Fabric >= 0.16.4
NeoForge >= 21.1.233 ## 📦 Modpack Feel free to include LT x EC in modpacks. ## 🌐 Looking for a server? Support me at the same time! Want to play with friends? Get your own server with [Wabbanode](http://wabbanode.com/affiliate/wildlight). Use the code **WILDLIGHT** to support me and get 25% off. [![Wabbanode server](https://i.postimg.cc/hvk4z0Vv/banner-3.png)](http://wabbanode.com/affiliate/wildlight)
